name: Product Search & Management
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can optimize product discoverability and streamline catalog navigation through Product Search Management in "},{"text":"Retail Express","bold":true},{"text":", which enables configuring search behavior and improving product findability for retail staff and customers. This search optimization helps retail operators reduce product lookup time and improve transaction efficiency, with effective search management typically supporting faster checkouts and better customer service across Australian retail operations."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product Search Management in "},{"text":"Retail Express","bold":true},{"text":" enables retail operators to configure search parameters and product visibility, helping ensure efficient product discovery during sales transactions and inventory management activities. This search configuration capability helps ensure your retail operations can quickly locate products while supporting efficient POS operations and improved customer service delivery."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Product Search & Management functionality combines powerful searching features with the ability to edit products en masse, or directly on a product from within the Search Results tab. Using Product Search & Management can save you a great deal of time, by applying changes quickly and easily to your products."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Staff can perform a similar search without accessing the bulk actions or cost/GP values via the standard Product Search functionality."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Using the Product Search & Management Tool"}],"data-id":"using-the-product-search-management-tool"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can access Product Search & Management using any of the below methods:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Inventory > Product Search & Management"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Reports > Stock Reports > Product Search & Management"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Quick Links > Product Search & Management"}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppjRhEAI.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppjRhEAI.jpg","embedType":"image","displaySize":"medium","float":"none","name":"mceclip0 Management:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Navigate to Product Search & Management using one of the methods described above"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Leave the fields as per default to search for all products"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click "},{"text":"Search","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Use the"},{"text":" action fields","bold":true},{"text":" at the top to apply bulk actions"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click the "},{"text":"Pencil ","bold":true},{"text":"icon to open a product for editing"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click "},{"text":"Export to Excel ","bold":true},{"text":"to download the results into an excel file"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Update a product row within the table to make changes directly to a product and click "},{"text":"Save Changes ","bold":true},{"text":"to save the modifications"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Search Filters"}],"data-id":"search-filters"},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/6TC3EZZFEAE3/screenshot-2026-01-20-at-4-41-51-e2-80-afpm.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/6TC3EZZFEAE3/screenshot-2026-01-20-at-4-41-51-e2-80-afpm.png","name":"Screenshot 4.41.51 PM.png","type":"image/png","size":1466750,"width":2876,"height":1626,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F6TC3EZZFEAE3%2Fscreenshot-2026-01-20-at-4-41-51-e2-80-afpm.png","active":true,"mediaID":1916,"dateInserted":"2026-01-20T11:13:09+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Search Filters allow you to narrow the search results down. There's an extensive list of search fields at the top, and by clicking on the Refine Search and Refine by Attributes section you can search using additional filters e.g. Product Type, Outlet, existing Max Discount rules etc."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Most of the filtering fields are self-explanatory, however, see the detailed information below for the more advanced fields."}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Field","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Details","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"PLU (ProductID, Supplier SKU, Manufacturer SKU, Additional Barcodes)"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Used to filter by specific products only. The code in this field must be an exact match."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"This filter will override all other filters i.e. they will be ignored."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Search for multiple products by entering each code separated by a comma e.g. 124001,124002."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]}],"actualHeight":282.375},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"PLU Wildcard Search"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Tick this box to apply a wildcard search to the value entered into the  PLU field above."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Wildcard allows you to enter only part of the code and if there is any match, even in the middle of the SKU code, the products will be included in the search results."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For example, if the Supplier SKU was \"TOP1-BBLK-MED\", typing \"BBLK-MED\" into the PLU field "},{"text":"without ","italic":true},{"text":"the wildcard option ticked will not return any results."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Ticking Wildcard Search and re-running the search will include that product, along with any other products containing \"BBLK-MED\" in their codes."}]}]}],"actualHeight":358.34375},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Stock Levels"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Displays products based on the current Available quantity. Options include:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Some AVL Some Stores - At least one Outlet has an Available quantity above zero"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Zero AVL All Stores - All Outlets have an Available quantity of zero or below"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Zero AVL Some Stores - At least one Outlet has an Available quantity of zero or below"}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"You can select the appropriate Outlets in the Refine Search section."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]}],"actualHeight":315.140625},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Custom Fields"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Returns any products with matching content in the Custom 1, Custom 2 or Custom 3 fields"}]}]}],"actualHeight":55.1875},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Gross Profit"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Allows you to find products based on their Gross Profit values - either a dollar ($) or percent (%) value. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To use the field:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Select a level: Equal To (=), Less than (<) or Greater Than (>)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Enter the value into the Profit Value field up to 2 decimal places e.g. 40.12"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Select either the dollar ($) or percent (%) value"}]}]}]}]}],"actualHeight":220.7421875},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Auto Replenish"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Used to filter products configured to create Purchase Orders automatically when sold at POS (refer to the Product Replenishment article for more information on this feature)"}]}]}],"actualHeight":98.375},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Show Packages"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"By default, the option to display both Products and Packages is selected. Select from the drop-down to select only products or only packages. "}]}]}],"actualHeight":76.78125},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Display Product Attributes"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Used to control whether the default attributes only are displayed in the search results, or if custom-created attributes should be included."}]}]}],"actualHeight":76.78125},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Price Updated From/To"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Displays products based on the \"Price Last Updated\" field, and whether the date of the last update matches the search requirements."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Price Last Updated\" field is updated any time the price changes for the product (both globally or at an Outlet level)."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]}],"actualHeight":226.375},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Show Disabled"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"By default Only Enabled is selected. Select from the drop-down to target only Disabled, or Both Enabled and Disabled. "}]}]}],"actualHeight":76.78125},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Has Not Sold"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Used to filter products based on when they were last sold; set to Ignore by default."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Date ranges only display products that have been sold at least once e.g. a product that was last sold 33 days ago will be displayed if either \"Ignore\" or \"Within 30 Days\" filters are selected. Products that have never been sold will "},{"text":"only ","italic":true},{"text":"appear in the \"Never\" filter. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"(This filter can be found in the Refined Search section)"}]}]}],"actualHeight":227.9375}],"id":"rich-table-674d7146","colSizes":[300,380]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Search Results"}],"data-id":"search-results"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"After making your selections on the Filters tab, click Search. top"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"A list of products at the disabled. If a product is disabled, it will not display in searches or reports unless specifically included in search filters."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For web store integrations, enabling the Prevent Disabling option also allows products to be sold online regardless of stock level. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Selecting the \"Allow Disabling\" option allows Retail Express to disable the product automatically, and web store integrations will take the inventory levels into consideration again. "}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product Disabled"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product Enabled"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enables or disables the products. When a product is disabled the product will not be displayed in searches or reports unless specifically included in search filters."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Disabled products will also cease communicating with integrated web stores."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"It's recommended to be cautious when disabling a synchronised product. This feature is useful for products not typically kept in stock but able to be easily ordered from a supplier e.g. expensive or oversized products."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Refer to Inventory ? Auto Replenishment (automatically create Purchase Orders via POS sales) for more information"}]}]}]}],"id":"rich-table-014e5866","colSizes":[300,300]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Frequently Asked Questions:"}],"data-id":"frequently-asked-questions"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/469-using-product-search-management#available","children":[{"text":"How is the \"Available\" inventory level calculated?"}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The count in the Available column (\"AVL\") is the total Available stock across all Outlets included in the search results. For example, if you have Outlet 1 (14 in stock) and Outlet 2 (6 in stock), and run a search for only Outlet 1, the results will display 14 in stock."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/469-using-product-search-management#products-web-store","children":[{"text":"Finding products integrated with web stores"}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To search for products integrated with Web Stores:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click the "},{"text":"Refine Search ","bold":true},{"text":"heading to expand the section"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"This will display either the URL for the Shopify web store or the Sales Channel name for eCommerce API/Magento web stores"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click "},{"text":"Search","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
